title: Use firearms to humanely destroy animals
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Use firearms to humanely destroy animals demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan for the shooting activity

pcs.text: Map location and boundaries for the shoot in accordance with the pest management plan and monitoring program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Map location and boundaries for the shoot in accordance with the pest management plan and monitoring program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Map location and boundaries for the shoot in accordance with the pest management plan and monitoring program.

pcs.text: Confirm location of habitats, habits and range of movement of target animal
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm location of habitats, habits and range of movement of target animal?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm location of habitats, habits and range of movement of target animal.

pcs.text: Determine timing of the shoot based on the activity patterns of the target animal and estimate time required to complete the shoot
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine timing of the shoot based on the activity patterns of the target animal and estimate time required to complete the shoot?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine timing of the shoot based on the activity patterns of the target animal and estimate time required to complete the shoot.

pcs.text: Identify hazards and risks and apply control measures associated with the shoot according to workplace safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and risks and apply control measures associated with the shoot according to workplace safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and risks and apply control measures associated with the shoot according to workplace safety procedures.

pcs.text: Identify environmental and personal and public safety risks associated with the shoot
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify environmental and personal and public safety risks associated with the shoot?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify environmental and personal and public safety risks associated with the shoot.

pcs.text: Identify, fit and use suitable personal protective equipment and warning signs required for the activity
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, fit and use suitable personal protective equipment and warning signs required for the activity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, fit and use suitable personal protective equipment and warning signs required for the activity.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Plan for the shooting activity

elements.title: Prepare for the shooting activity

pcs.text: Confirm anatomy and physical features identifying location of vulnerable organs of target animal
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm anatomy and physical features identifying location of vulnerable organs of target animal?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm anatomy and physical features identifying location of vulnerable organs of target animal.

pcs.text: Take precautions to minimise hazards and environmental risks associated with the shoot
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Take precautions to minimise hazards and environmental risks associated with the shoot?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Take precautions to minimise hazards and environmental risks associated with the shoot.

pcs.text: Select vehicles, equipment and materials intended for use and check for serviceability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select vehicles, equipment and materials intended for use and check for serviceability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select vehicles, equipment and materials intended for use and check for serviceability.

pcs.text: Ensure firearm licences and permits are current and applicable to purpose
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure firearm licences and permits are current and applicable to purpose?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure firearm licences and permits are current and applicable to purpose.

pcs.text: Select firearm and ammunition types to comply with recommendations and workplace procedures for target animal
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select firearm and ammunition types to comply with recommendations and workplace procedures for target animal?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select firearm and ammunition types to comply with recommendations and workplace procedures for target animal.

pcs.text: Ensure firearms, ammunition, and stowage for transportation meets licensing requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure firearms, ammunition, and stowage for transportation meets licensing requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure firearms, ammunition, and stowage for transportation meets licensing requirements.

pcs.text: Check and prepare firearm and ammunition
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and prepare firearm and ammunition?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and prepare firearm and ammunition.

pcs.text: Zero and test firearm according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Zero and test firearm according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Zero and test firearm according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Stow firearm for transport according to legislative and regulatory requirements and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Stow firearm for transport according to legislative and regulatory requirements and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Stow firearm for transport according to legislative and regulatory requirements and workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare for the shooting activity

elements.title: Shoot animals

pcs.text: Carry firearm safely with muzzle pointing in safe direction at all times according to industry best practice and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry firearm safely with muzzle pointing in safe direction at all times according to industry best practice and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry firearm safely with muzzle pointing in safe direction at all times according to industry best practice and workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Load, discharge and unload firearm according to safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Load, discharge and unload firearm according to safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Load, discharge and unload firearm according to safety procedures.

pcs.text: Aim firearm at vulnerable organ on the target animal and discharge firearm to kill using a single shot
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Aim firearm at vulnerable organ on the target animal and discharge firearm to kill using a single shot?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Aim firearm at vulnerable organ on the target animal and discharge firearm to kill using a single shot.

pcs.text: Check each target animal to ensure it is dead prior to selecting the next target animal
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check each target animal to ensure it is dead prior to selecting the next target animal?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check each target animal to ensure it is dead prior to selecting the next target animal.

pcs.text: Euthanise target animals that have not been killed cleanly
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Euthanise target animals that have not been killed cleanly?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Euthanise target animals that have not been killed cleanly.

pcs.text: Handle carcases required for research or commercial use to minimise personal health and safety and biosecurity risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Handle carcases required for research or commercial use to minimise personal health and safety and biosecurity risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Handle carcases required for research or commercial use to minimise personal health and safety and biosecurity risks.

pcs.text: Dispose of animal carcases not required for research or other purposes according to enterprise procedures to minimise biosecurity or public safety and health risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Dispose of animal carcases not required for research or other purposes according to enterprise procedures to minimise biosecurity or public safety and health risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dispose of animal carcases not required for research or other purposes according to enterprise procedures to minimise biosecurity or public safety and health risks.
